items.situation: A route amendment changes the cleared route to Victor 41 Frank, Victor 71 Delta, while everything else stays the same. Build the amended clearance.
items.target_phrase: VICTOR FORTY-ONE FRANK VICTOR SEVENTY-ONE DELTA REST OF ROUTE UNCHANGED

items.situation: An IFR aircraft is being cleared through O'Hare to Joliet VOR. Build the through clearance.
items.target_phrase: CLEARED THROUGH OHARE TO JOLIET V O R

items.situation: An aircraft is canceling IFR near an airport without an air/ground communications station. You need it to report cancellation on frequency or with McAlester Radio. Build the instruction.
items.target_phrase: NOVEMBER ONE THREE WHISKEY ALFA REPORT CANCELLATION OF IFR THIS FREQUENCY OR WITH MCALESTER RADIO

items.situation: An aircraft is departing on a SID and must comply with the SID except for a top altitude of FL180. Build the departure instruction.
items.target_phrase: CLIMB VIA SID EXCEPT MAINTAIN FLIGHT LEVEL ONE EIGHT ZERO

items.situation: You are issuing an abbreviated departure clearance to Reynolds Airport via the David Two Departure, Kingham Transition, then as filed, with a climb via SID. Build the clearance.
items.target_phrase: CLEARED TO REYNOLDS AIRPORT DAVID TWO DEPARTURE KINGHAM TRANSITION THEN AS FILED CLIMB VIA SID

items.situation: An aircraft must cross Lakeview VOR at or above FL200, then descend and maintain 6,000 feet. Build the altitude instruction.
items.target_phrase: CROSS LAKEVIEW V O R AT OR ABOVE FLIGHT LEVEL TWO ZERO ZERO DESCEND AND MAINTAIN SIX THOUSAND

items.situation: An aircraft is being cleared to Stillwater VOR and should hold north as published. Build the holding clearance.
items.target_phrase: CLEARED TO STILLWATER V O R HOLD NORTH AS PUBLISHED

items.situation: A military turbojet needs approach expectation and vectors. It should expect a surveillance approach to Runway 17 with radar vectors to final approach course. Build the advisory.
items.target_phrase: EXPECT SURVEILLANCE APPROACH TO RUNWAY ONE SEVEN RADAR VECTORS TO FINAL APPROACH COURSE

items.situation: The aircraft should expect the visual approach to Runway 25 Right, and the Runway 25 Right ILS is not operational. Build the approach information.
items.target_phrase: EXPECT VISUAL APPROACH RUNWAY TWO FIVE RIGHT RUNWAY TWO FIVE RIGHT I L S NOT OPERATIONAL

items.situation: An aircraft is at RDFSH and is being cleared for the ILS Runway 27 approach. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: AT RDFSH CLEARED I L S RUNWAY TWO SEVEN APPROACH

items.situation: An aircraft is cleared for the ILS Runway 7 Left approach, then must side-step to Runway 7 Right. Build the clearance.
items.target_phrase: CLEARED I L S RUNWAY SEVEN LEFT APPROACH SIDE-STEP TO RUNWAY SEVEN RIGHT

items.situation: After a low approach, the aircraft must climb and maintain 6,000 feet, then turn right heading 360. Build the instruction.
items.target_phrase: AFTER COMPLETING LOW APPROACH CLIMB AND MAINTAIN SIX THOUSAND TURN RIGHT HEADING THREE SIX ZERO
